analysis: Overall accuracy is 95% (18/19 labeled criteria matched exactly, n=40 total labels, 21 unmatched due to criterion-text drift). The weakest verdict class is UNCERTAIN at 50% recall, meaning the matcher most often mislabels this ground-truth category as something else. The remaining 1 error(s) are boundary calls between UNCERTAIN and a definite verdict, which is a lower-stakes miss than the UNKNOWN-to-definite case. Labels were hand-written from criterion text + vignette alone, blind to the matcher's own output, so this number reflects genuine matcher accuracy rather than label leakage.
